code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test04-AUG-2016Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows evidence of impaired renal function (elevated creatinine, significant proteinuria, low urine specific gravity), hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, and mild metabolic acidosis (low CO₂, high chloride). Urine findings (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal) suggest possible renal or hepatic involvement, but no clear infection. Further nephrological and metabolic evaluation is recommended.
